message:
feat: Universal import system - site-packages discovery + C extension linking

Agent 1: Site-packages discovery (~150 lines)
- discoverSitePackages() for Python 3.8-3.13
- Supports venv, system paths, user paths
- Pure Zig, zero Python dependency
- Tested with numpy (success) and requests (correct error)

Agent 2: C extension detection & linking (~100 lines)
- isCExtension() detects .so/.dylib/.pyd files
- Dynamic C library linking via -l flags
- Integrated with compiler pipeline
- Tracks c_libraries through codegen

Agent 3: File size discipline
- Split assign.zig (524→253 lines + 2 modules)
- Split generators.zig (527→110 lines + 2 modules)
- All files now < 500 lines

Result: 74/134 tests passing (55%)
Note: Tests dropped from 78 to 74 (investigating regressions)

Foundation for universal Python package support complete!
